race.description: Magain Fielke Real Estate Gawler Hcp
race.comment: EVERYTHINGISAUTUMN (10) came through two strong form races to kick-off the prep before proving too strong for them third-up at Bordertown. Added trip won't bother her, though the draw is sticky. LUMBER DREAM (4) closed off strongly into second behind EVERYTHINGISAUTUMN last start after turning a long way off them. Was a winner over this track and trip when he last tackled this set-up, so have to respect. LOCA BELLA (11) has been getting too far back throughout this campaign. Turned in a much better performance last time when taking off mid-race, so they may look to do the same again from another wide draw. TERRITORIAN (2) has proven frustrating for his supporters this prep but does boast strong peaks. Drops back to a more suitable trip after finishing midfield last start but will need a smart steer from the wide alley.
